name: Stanmore Resources Limited
analysis: SMR has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.6531. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.6514 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.6531, stop A$2.3463, target A$2.7688. Risk/reward is 0.38:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
